advisory.checklist_item: - [ ] Correct the runbook's 'both deploy paths (bot rebuild and the periodic converge)' to reflect the actual call sites: bot-rebuild success and the deploy-failure/backoff path.
evidence: infra/runbooks/review-bot-ops.md:351: runs `docker builder prune -f --keep-storage` + `docker image prune -f` on **both** deploy paths (bot rebuild and the periodic converge)
autodeploy.sh:140: prune_docker_caches (inside record_backoff_failure — the deploy-failure/backoff path, per autodeploy.sh:134)
ABSENCE: no 'converge' prune call site — search for prune_docker_caches returns only lines 124/140/190
advisory.finding: The runbook states prune_docker_caches runs 'on both deploy paths (bot rebuild and the periodic converge)', but the two actual call sites are the bot-rebuild success path and the deploy-failure/backoff path (record_backoff_failure) — there is no 'periodic converge' path that prunes.
advisory.suggested_fix: Change 'bot rebuild and the periodic converge' to 'bot-rebuild success path and the deploy-failure/backoff path (record_backoff_failure)'.

advisory.checklist_item: - [ ] Note in the Recover section that the /tmp paths assume default tempdir and must be adjusted when REBAR_GATE_TMPDIR/TMPDIR is set (or derive the base first).
evidence: infra/runbooks/review-bot-ops.md:332: rm -rf /tmp/rebar-gate-snapshots/tmp/*   # clear in-progress/leaked gate snapshot builds
infra/runbooks/review-bot-ops.md:333: rm -rf /tmp/reviewbot-*          # clear leaked per-change clone workdirs
advisory.finding: The Recover commands hardcode /tmp/rebar-gate-snapshots and /tmp/reviewbot-*, but the snapshot store base is overridable via REBAR_GATE_TMPDIR (and tempfile.gettempdir() honors TMPDIR); if either is set to a non-/tmp path the recover rm -rf commands clear nothing while the runbook implies they reclaim the leaked dirs.
